checks.detail: No evidence of orchestrator-authored content in data/ or site/. Agent charters (.claude/agents/*.md) scope each subagent's tools and write paths tightly (data-agent -> data/raw/ only, analyst-agent -> data/summary/ only, builder-agent -> site/ only), and every file in data/ and site/ conforms exactly to the schema its designated agent produces. Full verification of live orchestrator behaviour is outside file-based audit scope; based on repo state alone, nothing contradicts the invariant.

Tool scoping enforces one-way flow: data-agent.md tools = Strava MCP + Read/Write (no site/ access, 'Write ONLY under data/raw/'); analyst-agent.md tools = Read/Write only, no Strava tools ('never read Strava directly, never write HTML'); builder-agent.md has no Strava tools ('never call Strava, never modify data/'). Hand-verified raw->summary math for W25, W26, W27 (on-foot session counts, daily vert/time/distance sums) against data/raw/*.json and they reconcile exactly with data/summary/*.json (e.g. W26: 13 on-foot / 17 total sessions matches; W27 vert 1238m and distance 57026m matches raw sums to the metre).

Grepped every #hex literal in site/styles.css and site/app.js (site/index.html has none): all instances are among the 15 TMS9918 hex values from CLAUDE.md. Only non-palette color usage is alpha-only rgba(0,0,0,x) for scanline shading, which does not introduce a new hue.

Grepped site/ for href="/, src="/, url(/, fetch("/ and quote variants: zero matches. site/index.html loads styles.css and app.js relatively (no leading slash); site/app.js fetches './data/plan.json', './data/summary/index.json', and './data/summary/<week>.json' — all relative, safe for a knoxy.com/gtcb/ subpath deployment. scripts/gates/gate-c.mjs independently encodes this same check as a hard block.

All five raw and five summary files (W24-W28) use window.start = Mon 00:00:00, window.end = Sun 23:59:59, tz Europe/London, and iso_week matches the filename. Independently recomputed ISO week numbers from first principles (Jan 1 2026 = Thursday, so ISO week 1 starts Mon 2025-12-29): 2026-06-08 -> ISO week 24 (matches training week 1 = 2026-W24), and 2026-11-09 -> ISO week 46 (matches plan.json week 23 = 2026-W46, race week). All current-week activity start_date_local values in data/raw/2026-W28.json fall inside its window, and days_elapsed=4 correctly matches 'today' 2026-07-09 (Thu) into a Mon-start week.

data/plan.json contains 23 hand-authored weeks (W1 2026-06-08 -> W23 2026-11-09, phases Base/Build/Peak/Taper/Race matching CLAUDE.md), vert_target_m matches CLAUDE.md targets referenced by summaries (e.g. W28 target 1800). analyst-agent.md and builder-agent.md charters grant Read-only access to plan.json (no charter grants write access to it). site/data/plan.json is byte-identical to data/plan.json.

Grepped entire repo for sk-, ghp_, access_token, api_key, Authorization, BEGIN PRIVATE, client_secret: only hits are in 05_REVIEWER.md and the prior data/review/2026-W28.json, both of which merely reference the search pattern itself as review instructions, not an actual credential. Grep for STRAVA/OPENAI/api_key in .claude/ only matches MCP tool-name strings (mcp__claude_ai_Strava__...), not keys. No secrets found in data/ or site/.

This agent has no Bash/git tools, so commit-diff contents could not be inspected directly; based on the git log summary provided in context, the most recent pipeline commit ('595e664 refresh: 2026-W28 (plan-correction)') follows the 'refresh: <iso-week> (<label>)' convention from CLAUDE.md. The prior data/review/2026-W28.json was found stale during this audit — its invariant-2 detail cited a prorated target of 629 (implying target_m=1100), which did not match the current data/plan.json W28 target (1800) or data/summary/2026-W28.json (prorated_target_m=1029, consistent with target 1800), indicating it predated a later plan.json correction and had not been regenerated. That stale file is being replaced by this review as part of the current run.
